title: The starter modpack
description: A modpack based on simply optimized, which has most mods you need, including performance, voice chat, and more
body:
This modpack adds most mods you need to a single modpack, so you dont need to reinstall all your mods when updating!


<details>
<summary>mods included</summary>

# why would I want this?
If you want to have most mods that you use preinstalled whenever you update, this modpack is for you






the modpack is based on [simply optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), thanks to those who made it!
I will try to update it as quickly as i can when a new mc update releases.
